hero.badge: Solo game developer · VR & mobile · open to work
hero.heading: Designer by profession, game developer
hero.subcopy: I'm Alejandro Endo - an interactive-media designer with 6 years in software and 3.5 focused on Unity. Since 2021 I've lived in VR, chasing the elusive craft of game feel across a shelf of solo-built games.

skills.heading: A designer's eye and a developer's toolbox.
skills.subcopy: Shipping solo means I've owned the full loop — from prototype to feel. I can drop into gameplay or systems, work comfortably in VR and mobile, and sweat the last 10% that makes a build satisfying.

about.heading: Designer first, developer always.
paragraphs: I'm an interactive-media designer with a solid software-engineering background and 6 years of professional experience. For the last 3.5 I've specialised in Unity, mostly VR and mobile — and since 2021 I've poured my free time into side projects, honing gameplay dynamics and the elusive craft of game feel.

I recently graduated with honours from an MSc in Game Development at Universal Arts School, where I shipped several games as a solo developer. My goal is always the same: a final product that's captivating, satisfying, and genuinely enjoyable to play.

employers.heading: Where I've worked
employers.subcopy: Teams and clients I've built software and interactive experiences for.

en.label: The studio
en.tagline: A small game studio built with friends — where the solo work grows a team around it.
description: Lost Medium is a tiny, tight-knit studio I co-founded. It's where a few of us pool our disciplines — design, code, art, audio — to make games that are bigger than any one of us could ship alone.
We care about the same things I chase solo: readable systems, tools that make the team faster, and the last 10% of polish that makes a game feel great to play.

es.label: El estudio
es.tagline: Un pequeño estudio de videojuegos hecho con amigos — donde el trabajo en solitario forma un equipo a su alrededor.
description: Lost Medium es un estudio pequeño y unido que cofundé. Es donde varios juntamos nuestras disciplinas — diseño, código, arte, audio — para hacer juegos más grandes de lo que cualquiera podría sacar en solitario.
Nos importan las mismas cosas que persigo por mi cuenta: sistemas legibles, herramientas que hacen al equipo más rápido, y ese último 10% de pulido que hace que un juego se sienta genial.

contact.heading: Need a solo dev who sweats the game feel?
contact.subcopy: I'm open to gameplay, systems, VR and mobile roles — remote or relocating. Let's make something that feels great to play.
